sql_array: INSERT INTO test_dates VALUES (timestamp_add(toDate('2020-01-01'), INTERVAL 5 DAY));
UPDATE test_dates SET event_date = timestamp_add(event_date, INTERVAL 2 HOUR) WHERE event_date = toDateTime('2020-01-01 00:00:00');
SELECT timestamp_add(event_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AS future_date FROM test_dates;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_dates WHERE event_date > timestamp_add(toDate('2020-01-01'), INTERVAL 1 YEAR);
